name: Rivage Bal Harbour
description: Rivage Bal Harbour rises as the newest ultra-luxury residential tower in one of Miami's most exclusive enclaves. Developed by Related Group and designed by Arquitectonica with interiors by Rottet Studio, this 24-story oceanfront masterpiece offers just 56 residences, ensuring the utmost privacy and exclusivity. Each residence features flow-through layouts with panoramic ocean and Intracoastal views, private elevator access, and 10-foot ceilings.
longDescription:
Located on the pristine shores of Bal Harbour, Rivage represents the pinnacle of Miami luxury living. The name, meaning 'shore' in French, reflects the development's deep connection to its waterfront setting. Residents enjoy over 500 linear feet of direct beachfront, a private marina, and proximity to the world-renowned Bal Harbour Shops.

Every detail has been carefully curated, from the Italian marble lobbies to the chef-grade Gaggenau kitchens. The building's curved glass facade maximizes views while creating a striking silhouette against the skyline. Floor plans range from spacious 2-bedroom residences to expansive 5-bedroom penthouses with private rooftop terraces.
residenceFeatures: Private Elevator Entry to Each Residence
Laundry Room with Full-Size Washer & Dryer

name: Dolce & Gabbana Residences
description: 888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana is a one-of-a-kind branded residential tower rising 90 stories in the heart of Brickell, Miami's financial and cultural hub. This collaboration between JDS Development, Turnberry, and the iconic Italian fashion house creates an unprecedented living experience where haute couture meets architecture.
longDescription:
Every element of 888 Brickell has been designed through the lens of Dolce & Gabbana's unmatched aesthetic sensibility. From the hand-selected Sicilian marble in the grand lobby to the bespoke D&G furnishings available in select residences, this tower is a celebration of Italian craftsmanship.

Rising as one of the tallest residential towers south of Manhattan, 888 Brickell offers sweeping views of Biscayne Bay, the Atlantic Ocean, and the Miami skyline. The building includes over 30,000 square feet of world-class amenities, including a D&G-branded spa, a rooftop pool deck, and an exclusive residents' club.
residenceFeatures: D&G Custom Interior Design Packages Available
Deep Soaking Tubs in Master Baths

name: Mercedes-Benz Places
description: Mercedes-Benz Places Brickell brings the legendary German engineering ethos to luxury residential living. Designed by Pritzker Prize winner Rem Koolhaas and OMA, this 65-story tower is the first-ever Mercedes-Benz branded residential development, combining automotive precision with architectural innovation.
longDescription:
Every detail of Mercedes-Benz Places reflects the brand's commitment to performance, innovation, and design excellence. The building features a revolutionary lobby with a rotating art installation, sky gardens at multiple levels, and the signature Mercedes-Benz Lounge offering panoramic views of Biscayne Bay.

Residences feature the finest materials — from German-engineered kitchen systems to ambient lighting inspired by the Mercedes-AMG interior design philosophy. The building's sustainable design includes LEED Gold certification, green roofs, and an advanced air filtration system.
buildingAmenities: EV Charging for All Parking Spots

name: Waldorf Astoria Miami
description: Waldorf Astoria Hotel & Residences Miami is set to become the tallest tower south of New York City at 100 stories. This landmark development by PMG and Greybrook brings the legendary Waldorf Astoria brand to downtown Miami, combining five-star hotel services with private luxury residences.
longDescription:
The Waldorf Astoria Miami represents a new chapter in luxury hospitality and residential living. The tower's striking silhouette, designed by Carlos Ott with Sieger Suarez Architects, features nine offset glass cubes that create a sculptural presence on the Miami skyline.

Residents enjoy full access to Waldorf Astoria's legendary services: in-residence dining, housekeeping, a world-class spa, and the iconic Peacock Alley social lounge. The building also features an innovative sky deck at the 100th floor with 360-degree views of Miami, the Everglades, and the Atlantic Ocean.

name: Cipriani Residences Miami
description: Cipriani Residences Miami brings the storied legacy of the Cipriani family to Brickell's waterfront. This 80-story tower by Mast Capital offers 397 exquisite residences with the signature Cipriani hospitality that has defined luxury since 1931, from Harry's Bar in Venice to the world's most exclusive addresses.
longDescription:
For nearly a century, the Cipriani name has been synonymous with timeless Italian elegance and impeccable service. Now, that legacy extends to residential living in Miami. Cipriani Residences features a private Cipriani restaurant exclusively for residents, a signature Cipriani pool club, and the brand's legendary butler service.

Designed by Arquitectonica with interiors by 1508 London, the tower rises elegantly above Brickell's skyline, offering unobstructed views of Biscayne Bay and the city. Each residence is a masterclass in refined living, with custom finishes, generous terraces, and the warm hospitality that only Cipriani can deliver.

name: Baccarat Residences Miami
description: Baccarat Residences Miami brings the legendary French crystal house's commitment to brilliance and craftsmanship to a 75-story tower in Brickell. Developed by Related Group, every residence is adorned with Baccarat crystal fixtures and reflects the Maison's 260-year tradition of artistry.
longDescription:
Since 1764, Baccarat has been the world's foremost crystal manufacturer, adorning palaces, five-star hotels, and the finest homes. Now, that legacy of luminosity extends to residential living in Miami's most dynamic neighborhood.

Baccarat Residences features the brand's signature crystal chandeliers in the grand lobby, a Baccarat Bar with handcrafted crystal glassware, and residences that sparkle with crystal-inspired design details. The tower's facade catches light throughout the day, creating a prismatic effect that changes with the Miami sun.

name: St. Regis Residences Miami
description: The St. Regis Residences Miami represents the brand's return to South Florida with an intimate, ultra-luxury tower on Brickell Avenue. With just 152 residences across 48 stories and the legendary St. Regis Butler Service, this is residential living at its most refined.
longDescription:
Designed by Robert A.M. Stern Architects — the firm behind 15 Central Park West and 220 Central Park South in New York — the St. Regis Residences Miami brings a classic, timeless aesthetic to Brickell's skyline. The building's limestone-clad facade and gracious proportions set it apart from the neighborhood's glass towers.

Every resident enjoys the St. Regis Butler Service, available 24/7 for everything from unpacking luggage to arranging private events. The building's social spaces include the iconic St. Regis Bar, a grand salon for entertaining, and a waterfront garden that evokes the brand's Astor heritage.

name: Aria Reserve
description: Aria Reserve is an ambitious dual-tower development in Edgewater by the Melo Group, rising 62 stories to become the tallest waterfront residential towers in the United States. With 782 bayfront residences and a 2-acre recreation deck, Aria Reserve offers unmatched waterfront living at an accessible price point.
longDescription:
Situated on a prime 5-acre bayfront site in Edgewater, Aria Reserve offers panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, Miami Beach, and the city skyline. The two-tower complex is connected by a spectacular amenity deck featuring multiple pools, sports courts, and lush tropical landscaping.

Aria Reserve has quickly become one of Miami's fastest-selling developments, attracting buyers from around the world with its combination of waterfront living, generous amenities, and competitive pricing.

name: Six Fisher Island
address: 6 Fisher Island Drive, Fisher Island, FL 33109
description: Six Fisher Island is the most exclusive residential offering in Miami — perhaps in the world. Located on the ultra-private Fisher Island, accessible only by ferry or yacht, this intimate collection of just 50 residences offers the privacy and luxury that the world's most discerning buyers demand.
longDescription:
Fisher Island has long been America's wealthiest zip code, home to billionaires, celebrities, and heads of state. Six Fisher Island raises the bar even further with sprawling residences ranging from 4,000 to 12,000 square feet, each with private garden terraces and unobstructed ocean views.

Designed by Fernando Wong with interiors by the legendary Luis Bustamante, every residence is a bespoke masterpiece. Residents enjoy access to the Fisher Island Club's 18-hole golf course, marina, private beach, and world-class dining — plus Six Fisher Island's own exclusive amenities.

name: Mandarin Oriental Residences
description: Mandarin Oriental Residences Miami marks the legendary hotel brand's expansion on Brickell Key with an 80-story tower designed by Kohn Pedersen Fox. Featuring Mandarin Oriental's signature service and interiors by Yabu Pushelberg, this is hospitality-driven luxury living at its finest.
longDescription:
Building on the success of the existing Mandarin Oriental Miami hotel on Brickell Key, this new residential tower extends the brand's presence with 220 private residences. The island setting provides a rare sense of tranquility in the heart of the city, surrounded by water on all sides.

Yabu Pushelberg's interiors draw inspiration from the Orient and Miami's tropical landscape, blending natural materials with contemporary sophistication. Every residence offers bay or ocean views, and residents enjoy priority access to the Mandarin Oriental Spa, one of the top-rated spas in North America.

name: E11EVEN Hotel & Residences
description: E11EVEN Hotel & Residences brings the energy of Miami's legendary E11EVEN nightclub to a 65-story tower in Downtown Miami. This first-of-its-kind 24/11 concept combines luxury residences with world-class entertainment, a rooftop pool and lounge, and a built-in short-term rental program.
longDescription:
Inspired by the brand that never sleeps, E11EVEN Residences is designed for a new generation of buyers who want to live where the action is. The tower's entertainment amenities are unmatched: a rooftop pool and dayclub, a casino-style gaming lounge, a residents-only speakeasy, and direct access to the E11EVEN ecosystem.

The built-in hotel and short-term rental program makes E11EVEN Residences a compelling investment opportunity, with owners able to rent their units when not in use through the in-house management program.

name: Casa Bella Residences by B&B Italia
description: Casa Bella Residences by B&B Italia is a 56-story tower in Downtown Miami that brings the world-renowned Italian furniture brand's design philosophy to residential living. With interiors by Piero Lissoni, every space is a study in minimalist elegance and functional beauty.
longDescription:
B&B Italia has furnished the world's finest residences for over 50 years. Casa Bella is the brand's first fully designed residential tower, where Piero Lissoni has curated every detail from lobby to penthouse. Residences come with optional B&B Italia furniture packages, bringing museum-quality design into everyday living.

The tower's bayfront location in Downtown Miami offers easy access to the Adrienne Arsht Center, Museum Park, and the Design District, making it ideal for design-conscious buyers who want both culture and convenience.

name: Bentley Residences
address: 18401 Collins Avenue, Sunny Isles Beach, FL 33160
description: Bentley Residences Sunny Isles Beach is the world's first Bentley-branded residential tower, developed by Dezer Development. Rising 63 stories on the pristine shores of Sunny Isles Beach, this architectural masterpiece features the revolutionary Dezervator — a patented car elevator that delivers your vehicle directly to your residence.
longDescription:
Inspired by Bentley Motors' philosophy of handcrafted luxury and uncompromising quality, Bentley Residences redefines oceanfront living. The tower's most distinctive feature is the Dezervator car elevator system, allowing residents to park up to 4 vehicles in their own private garage — in the sky, next to their living room.

Every residence offers direct ocean views, sunrise-to-sunset exposures, and a minimum of 2,300 square feet of living space. The Bentley Motors design team has curated every detail, from the diamond-quilted leather wall panels to the handcrafted wood veneers. This is not just a home — it is a statement.
buildingAmenities: Dezervator (Patented Car Elevator to Your Unit)
In-Unit Car Gallery (Park Your Cars at Home)
residenceFeatures: Dezervator In-Unit Car Parking (Up to 4 Cars)

name: Shell Bay Residences
address: 1 Shell Bay Drive, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009
description: Shell Bay Residences offers an unprecedented waterfront lifestyle in Hallandale Beach, combining ultra-luxury residences with a Audubon-certified 18-hole golf course, a private marina, and a members-only beach club. Just 108 residences ensure an intimate, resort-like experience.
longDescription:
Set on 80 acres of pristine waterfront land, Shell Bay is one of the last great development sites in South Florida. The community features a redesigned championship golf course, a deep-water marina with slips for yachts up to 100 feet, and a private beach club on the Intracoastal.

Residences by Tara Bernerd & Partners blend contemporary design with natural materials, creating warm, sophisticated interiors that complement the lush natural surroundings. Every home offers expansive views of the golf course, Intracoastal Waterway, or the Atlantic Ocean.

name: Villa Miami
tagline: A Vertical Village on the Bay
description: Villa Miami is a unique collaboration between Major Food Group — the culinary empire behind Carbone, ZZ's, and Sadelle's — and JDS Development, designed by Rem Koolhaas and OMA. This 58-story tower offers just 60 residences with an unprecedented focus on food, entertainment, and community.
longDescription:
Villa Miami reimagines the residential tower as a vertical village where culinary culture is at the heart of daily life. The building features a private Carbone restaurant exclusively for residents, a rooftop Italian garden and trattoria, a Major Food Group-curated food market, and communal dining spaces designed for entertaining.

OMA's design creates a series of offset volumes that open up to dramatic double-height social spaces and sky gardens throughout the tower. With only 60 residences, Villa Miami offers a level of intimacy and community rarely found in a high-rise.
